testsuite.name: WordFrequencyCounterTest

testcase.name: Test 1.1: Empty file returns empty map
Test 2.3: Tabs and newlines as separators
Test 2.5: Words with numbers and symbols
Test 4.3: Large file (> 500 MB) - STREAMING TEST
